texto: I did four movies where I gained, like, fifty pounds. I had curly hair, and I had all of this facial hair. I had put on all this weight for these movies, and I did four or five of them back-to-back. Then I cut the weight and I got fit again. I cut my beard and I took away the mustache, and people were like, 'What are you doing?'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a A. J. Bowen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I did four movies where I gained, like, fifty pounds. I had curly hair, and I had all of this fac…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, hair, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e you.

frase_original: I did four movies where I gained, like, fifty pounds. I had curly hair, and I had all of this facial hair. I had put on all this weight for these movies, and I did four or five of them back-to-back. Then I cut the weight and I got fit again. I cut my beard and I took away the mustache, and people were like, 'What are you doing?'
